This PR adds docs/README.md: a README that centralizes navigation to OctoAcme's project management process documents and provides a brief overview of the practices used.

Summary:
- Adds docs/README.md with a short overview of OctoAcme’s lifecycle (Initiation → Planning → Execution → Release → Retrospective), key workflows, personas, communication cadence, and quality practices.
- Includes direct links to each file in the docs/ folder for quick discoverability.

Linked issue:
- Refs #2

Acceptance criteria:
- [x] Content aligns with existing process docs
- [x] Update improves clarity or closes a documented gap
- [ ] Proposed content has been reviewed with stakeholders (if needed)
